_note: Canonical preprocess() conformance vectors. A byte-identical copy lives in the other repo (routelet at tests/, peeky at peeky/tests/); keep the two in sync. preprocess is the intent-independent input normalization the model sees at BOTH training and inference: (1) lowercase; (2) strip trailing whitespace and terminal .!? runs, but if that run contained a '?' append exactly one '?' back (the question register is signal; STT periods are noise); (3) after a secret keyword, mask the remainder; (4) emails -> <EMAIL>; (5) runs of 4+ digits -> <NUM>. It must NOT depend on intent (inference does not know the intent yet). The Rust and Python implementations must reproduce every `out` exactly.
